mission.title: vllm: Support rerank models
mission.description: Add support for rerank (cross-encoder) models in vLLM, enabling high-throughput reranking for RAG workflows. Rerank models like jina-reranker-v2 and bge-reranker are essential for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Requested by 35+ users.

steps.title: Check current vLLM setup
steps.description:
Verify your vLLM version and configuration:
```bash
pip show vllm | grep Version
# or
python -c "import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)"
```
Rerank model support requires a recent version of vLLM.

steps.title: Understand rerank models in vLLM
steps.description:
Rerank models are cross-encoder models that score query-document pairs for relevance. They are critical in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) workflows for re-ordering retrieved documents before passing them to an LLM.

vLLM added support for serving rerank models like jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual, which uses a RoBERTa-based architecture.

steps.title: Serve a rerank model with vLLM
steps.description:
Start the vLLM server with a rerank model:
```bash
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual \
  --task score
```
The `--task score` flag tells vLLM to serve the model as a scoring/reranking endpoint rather than a text generation endpoint.

steps.title: Verify reranking works
steps.description:
Test the reranking endpoint:
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/score \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual", "query": "What is machine learning?", "documents": ["ML is a subset of AI", "The weather is sunny today"]}'
```
The response should contain relevance scores for each query-document pair.

resolution.summary: vLLM added support for rerank (cross-encoder) models by recognizing model architectures like jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual (RoBERTa-based) and exposing a scoring endpoint. This enables high-throughput reranking in RAG pipelines using vLLM's serving infrastructure.
codeSnippets:
# Serve a rerank model
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual \
  --task score

# Query the reranking endpoint
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/score \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "jinaai/jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual", "query": "What is ML?", "documents": ["ML is AI", "Weather is sunny"]}'

prerequisites.description: Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm).
